steps.label: Referral Information Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter all the required details to create a new referral. Please provide accurate information about the individual being referred, including their contact details and a description of the concern or service need. You will also specify the urgency level of the referral. All required fields are marked with an asterisk (*). Review your entries carefully before submitting. Once submitted, the referral will be processed and assigned for intake review. If you have questions about any field, hover over the information icon for guidance.

fields.label: Middle Name
fields.error_message: Middle Name must be valid text.

fields.label: Phone
fields.error_message: Phone number is required and must be valid.

fields.label: Email
fields.error_message: Email is required and must be a valid email address.

fields.label: Description of Concern or Service Need
fields.error_message: Description of Concern or Service Need is required.

fields.label: Date of Referral
fields.error_message: Date of Referral is required and must be a valid date.

data_validation: Phone number must be in a valid format.
Email must be in a valid email format.
Date of Referral cannot be in the future.
All required fields must be completed before submission.
If Urgency Level is 'High', ensure Description of Concern or Service Need provides sufficient detail.
No duplicate referrals for the same individual on the same date.

buttons.label: Submit Referral
buttons.description: Click to submit the referral information for processing. Once submitted, the referral will be timestamped and routed for intake assignment.
actions: Trigger Assign to Agency Intake Worker

steps.label: Submit Referral
steps.description: When the 'Submit Referral' button is clicked by the Referral Worker, the system must capture all entered referral data, create a new referral record, timestamp the submission, and flag the record with the selected urgency level. Additionally, the system must trigger audit logging and compliance documentation actions as part of the submission process.
Input Parameter: Description of Concern or Service Need

rules.label: Capture Referral Data
rules.logic: On 'Submit Referral' button click, collect the values from all required and optional fields: First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, Phone, Email, Address, Description of Concern or Service Need, Date of Referral, and Urgency Level.

rules.label: Create Referral Record
rules.logic: Create a new referral record in the system using the captured data. Ensure all required fields are present and valid before record creation.

rules.label: Timestamp Submission
rules.logic: Record the current system date and time as the submission timestamp for the new referral record.

rules.label: Flag Urgency Level
rules.logic: Set the urgency level flag on the referral record based on the value selected in the 'Urgency Level' field.

rules.label: Trigger Audit Logging
rules.logic: Log the referral submission event, including the user ID of the Referral Worker, timestamp, and all submitted data, in the system audit log.

rules.label: Trigger Compliance Documentation
rules.logic: Initiate any required compliance documentation processes associated with the referral submission, as per system and regulatory requirements.

relationships.endNode: Description of Concern or Service Need
